hypothesis: If a cross-modal predictive model jointly encodes crystal graphs, RoboCrystallographer text (via MatSciBERT), and simulated XRD patterns and trains each modality to predict the others with VIC/contrastive regularization, then material property prediction MAE on Matbench tasks and AFLOW band gap will be lower than CGCNN/CoGN/ALIGNN baselines because aligning complementary modalities yields a more generalizable latent representation with minimal fine-tuning.
